description: Sell globally: currency, tax, shipping, localization, compliance

items.name: Market selection
items.tactic: Choose by GDP/capita, ecommerce adoption, competition. Brazil/Mexico = easy.

items.name: Currency + FX
items.tactic: Price in local currency. Real-time FX rates. Hedge if forecast >30 days.

items.name: Tax compliance
items.tactic: Brazil 17% VAT. Mexico 16% VAT. Auto-calculate per destination.

items.name: Local payment methods
items.tactic: Brazil PIX. Mexico OXXO. Argentina Mercado Pago. USA credit card.

items.name: Shipping carriers
items.tactic: Americas DHL (fast). Regional local (cheap). EasyPost integration.
